inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the accessible name of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Receives id(or many ids) of the elements that label the component.

inputs.name: name
inputs.description:
Determines the name by which the component will be identified upon submission in an HTML form.

*Note:** This property is only applicable within the context of an HTML Form element.

inputs.name: simplified
inputs.description: When set to `true`, the alpha slider and inputs for RGB values will not be displayed.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Defines the currently selected color of the component.

*Note**: use HEX, RGB, RGBA, HSV formats or a CSS color name when modifying this property.

outputs.name: ui5Change
outputs.description: Fired when the the selected color is changed
